I just joined the Black Women Sales Army and I need to tell you about it.
Black Women Sell Live is happening September 25–27 in Atlanta, GA. Three days. A thousand women. The biggest event for Black women experts and professionals in the world.
The speakers alone would make this worth it. Madam CJ Walker's great-great-granddaughter. Dr. Tricia Bailey — one of the first Black women billionaires. History makers on top of history makers.
And the content is specifically designed for women like us —

Prayed about the jump into Tenacity. Found a connection, like they understand. Unlike other groups, here I get results by just sticking to it. Candid conversations, real numbers, real elevation. #Tenacity #BusinessGrowth #FoundationBuilding #EntrepreneurJourney #RealTalk #Community #Motivation #CleaningBusiness #ResultsDrivenResults may vary. Tenacity Academy does not guarantee any specific financial outcomes or business success. Any results shared are examples and are not typical. Success in this program depends on multiple factors including, but not limited to, individual effort, experience, market conditions, and implementation of the material provided.

You're busy cleaning houses, managing clients, putting out fires, and trying not to lose your mind. 🤦🏾♀️

That's why we created the 💎 DIAMOND BUSINESS IN A BOX PROGRAM 💎

We help y

You don't have a money problem.

You have a decision-making problem that's costing you money.

Every day, entrepreneurs make decisions that either move them closer to success or further away from it.

The decision to procrastinate.
The decision to stay comfortable.
The decision to avoid learning.
The decision to undercharge.
The decision to keep doing everything yourself.
The decision to wait for the "perfect time."

Those decisions have a price tag attached to them.

Your bank account is often

A recent cleaning company settlement is a reminder that getting customers matters, but how you market matters too.

If you're advertising a special offer, make sure pricing, memberships, cancellation policies, and terms are clear from the start. Short-term wins from misleading marketing can lead to long-term problems.

Trust is built through transparency, not fine print.

Freedom in business isn’t about doing everything yourself. Real freedom comes from creating systems, automation, and processes that allow your business to run without depending on you every second. If you have to answer every message, solve every problem, and handle every task alone, you don’t own a business, you own a job. Automation, delegation, and structure create consistency, save time, reduce stress, and give you the ability to actually grow.

Black women have always built businesses, created wealth, and led innovation — even when opportunities were limited. Black Women Sell Live 2026 is more than a conference. It’s a room built for Black women ready to master sales, scale smarter, strengthen their messaging, and grow beyond survival mode. No fluff. No surface-level motivation. Just real strategy, real implementation, and real conversations with women building at a higher level. September 25–27, 2026.Get your ticket today https://MsJo
